attributes.name: Solitaire Card Game Interface
attributes.summary: A card game component that implements the classic Solitaire experience, focusing on organizing and moving playing cards within a structured layout. It tracks game statistics such as number of games played, won, and best completion time. The component manages game setup, card dealing, and user interactions like selecting, moving, and double-clicking cards to automate moves to foundations. It features gameplay mechanics including drawing from a stock pile, recycling waste cards, and organizing cards onto foundation piles in ascending order by suit, as well as cascading tableau columns in descending order with alternating colors. The component provides visual cues for card selection, face-down/up states, and completed game detection, delivering an interactive, timer-supported solitaire interface with a scoring overview and replay option.
